title: Find Indices With Index and Value Difference I
titleCn: 找出满足差值条件的下标 I

testcases.input: nums = [5,1,4,1], indexDifference = 2, valueDifference = 4 Output: [0,3] Explanation: In this example, i = 0 and j = 3 can be selected. abs(0 - 3) >= 2 and abs(nums[0] - nums[3]) >= 4. Hence, a valid answer is [0,3]. [3,0] is also a valid answer.
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,3] Explanation: In this example, i = 0 and j = 3 can be selected. abs(0 - 3) >= 2 and abs(nums[0] - nums[3]) >= 4. Hence, a valid answer is [0,3]. [3,0] is also a valid answer.

testcases.input: nums = [2,1], indexDifference = 0, valueDifference = 0 Output: [0,0] Explanation: In this example, i = 0 and j = 0 can be selected. abs(0 - 0) >= 0 and abs(nums[0] - nums[0]) >= 0. Hence, a valid answer is [0,0]. Other valid answers are [0,1], [1,0], and [1,1].
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,0] Explanation: In this example, i = 0 and j = 0 can be selected. abs(0 - 0) >= 0 and abs(nums[0] - nums[0]) >= 0. Hence, a valid answer is [0,0]. Other valid answers are [0,1], [1,0], and [1,1].

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3], indexDifference = 2, valueDifference = 4 Output: [-1,-1] Explanation: In this example, it can be shown that it is impossible to find two indices that satisfy both conditions. Hence, [-1,-1] is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: [-1,-1] Explanation: In this example, it can be shown that it is impossible to find two indices that satisfy both conditions. Hence, [-1,-1] is returned.
